response.original_title: Marco da Silva Ferreira : F*cking Future Biennale de la Danse de Lyon 2025
response.overview: Portuguese choreographer Marco da Silva Ferreira explores the relationship between dance and patriarchy in *F*cking Future*, a performance presented at the Lyon Dance Biennale.
response.title: Marco da Silva Ferreira: F*cking Future @ Lyon Biennale de la Danse 2025
